description: Grid searched on 20% subsample (12 configs), selected by filtering to recall>=0.88 (assignment requirement) then maximizing F1 among qualifying configs — not global best F1. Best: C=0.01, penalty=l1, class_weight=balanced. Confirmed on full train set.
notes: Building on exp_07 (redundant removed, F1=0.4902, recall=0.6760 — below the 0.88 target). Unconstrained best-F1 config only reached recall=0.6683, failing the objective; this run explicitly optimizes F1 subject to recall>=0.88.

description: Swept custom class_weight={0:1, 1:ratio} for ratio in [1, 1.5, 2, 2.5, 3, 3.5, 4, 4.5, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9] combined with decision threshold in [0.10, 0.50]. Selected by filtering recall>=0.88 then maximizing F1. Best: weight_ratio=2.5, threshold=0.4.
notes: Building on exp_08 (class_weight='balanced', F1=0.2919, recall=0.9219 — overshot target). Custom weight dial + threshold search found a less aggressive setting that still clears recall>=0.88 with better precision/F1.

description: FINAL confirmed score on locked-away test set. Model: class_weight={0:1, 1:2.5}, threshold=0.4, on Stage 2.6 feature set (freq encoding + row stats + interactions, redundant columns removed).
notes: This is the ONLY test-set evaluation in the entire project. Validation score was F1=0.3444, recall=0.8837. Test score confirms whether this generalizes.
